words.explanation: A journey is when you travel from one place to another, usually over a long distance.
words.example: I went on a long journey across Europe last summer.
words.association: Imagine going on a long adventure with a backpack.

words.explanation: Courage is the ability to do something that frightens you or is difficult.
words.example: It takes courage to speak in front of a large audience.
words.association: Think of a lion - brave and fearless.

words.explanation: Wisdom is the quality of having experience, knowledge, and good judgment.
words.example: With age comes wisdom and understanding.
words.association: Picture an old owl sitting on a tree - wise and thoughtful.

words.explanation: An adventure is an exciting experience or journey that involves some risk.
words.example: Life is an adventure - embrace every moment!
words.association: Think of Indiana Jones exploring ancient temples.

words.explanation: Harmony is a state of peaceful agreement and cooperation between people or things.
words.example: They lived in perfect harmony with nature.
words.association: Imagine a beautiful symphony where all instruments play together.

words.explanation: Persistence is continuing to do something despite difficulties or opposition.
words.example: Success requires persistence and hard work.
words.association: Think of water drops that eventually carve through stone.

words.explanation: Serendipity is finding something good or useful by chance.
words.example: Meeting my best friend was pure serendipity.
words.association: Finding a $20 bill in your old jacket pocket.

words.explanation: Resilience is the ability to recover quickly from difficulties.
words.example: The team showed great resilience after the defeat.
words.association: Like a rubber band that returns to its shape after stretching.

words.explanation: Enthusiasm is intense and eager enjoyment or interest in something.
words.example: She approached the project with great enthusiasm.
words.association: Think of a child opening birthday presents - full of excitement!

words.explanation: Perspective is a particular way of viewing or understanding something.
words.example: Traveling gives you a new perspective on life.
words.association: Looking at a painting from different angles changes what you see.
